heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 8146 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated for carrying out the purposes of this subchapter not to exceed $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1979, and not to exceed $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1980. Any amounts appropriated under this section shall remain available until expended.
notes: Amendments1979— reduced authorization of appropriation for fiscal year 1980 from “$10,000,000” to “$5,000,000”.Pub. L. 96–153
amendments: Amendments1979— reduced authorization of appropriation for fiscal year 1980 from “$10,000,000” to “$5,000,000”.Pub. L. 96–153
